description: Assemble a formal hazard assessment presentation by extracting data from a demographics text report, a historical eruption CSV, and a hazard map. Using the draft presentation at ~/Documents/Presentations/Rainier_Hazard_Briefing_Draft.pptx and reference data in ~/Documents/Rainier_Data/, expand the presentation from 2 to exactly 5 slides. Slide 3 must be titled 'Historical Eruptions' and contain a table summarizing lahar events from historical_activity.csv, including the 'Osceola' and 'Electron' mudflows. Slide 4 must be titled 'Population at Risk' and summarize risk_demographics.txt, including the '80,000' residents figure. Slide 5 must be titled 'Evacuation Zones' and include the image lahar_evacuation_map.jpg. Save the completed presentation to ~/Documents/Presentations/Rainier_Hazard_Briefing_Final.pptx.
